category_sources: Official gRPC docs https://grpc.io/docs/languages/go/generated-code/ describe generated code from protoc using protoc-gen-go-grpc.
source_facts.description says it is a protoc plugin that generates code for gRPC-Go clients.
display_name_sources: Official gRPC-Go repository contains cmd/protoc-gen-go-grpc and uses the same command name.
docs_sources: Official Go quick start documents installing google.golang.org/grpc/cmd/protoc-gen-go-grpc.
Official gRPC generated-code reference documents protoc-gen-go-grpc output.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/grpc/grpc-go, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official gRPC docs describe Go generated code and plugin installation.
source_facts.description identifies gRPC-Go client code generation.
